title: Set to Standard
description: ✨ Gives some older textures a bit more love.
body:
**Set to Standard** is a *(WIP)* texture pack overhauling any textures I see fit. Some may fix some small pet peeves while others may completely retexture them. Currently, it retextures all vanilla planks, stone and ores, and oak logs just to name a few.

It even completely retextures **Alex's Delight** with new textures for every food item!
